compatibility_rule: Partner menu compatibility is valid only after Reversa detects the BO3Enhanced lane or an explicitly selected BO3Enhanced test profile.

lessons.lesson: The partner menu depends on BO3Enhanced as a full runtime contract, not just a few copied offsets.
lessons.transformed_action: Detect the BO3Enhanced lane explicitly and keep menu compatibility features behind that detected contract.

lessons.transformed_action: Train Reversa to treat T7WSBootstrapper/T7InternalWS/WSBlackOps3 as one lane instead of independent optional files.

lessons.lesson: The runtime contract includes file-backed config for player name, friends-only, and network password behavior.
lessons.transformed_action: Prefer file-backed runtime state and do not rely on Steam launch environment inheritance for menu-critical switches.

lessons.lesson: BO3Enhanced carries crash-hardening and private-session behavior that the menu expects to coexist with.
lessons.transformed_action: Do not run the partner menu as if plain Steam BO3 and BO3Enhanced have the same safety/runtime surface.

evidence.text: - This project includes support for the T7Patch linux config file. After first boot you can edit the config for a network password and will be able to play with other T7Patch players if you wish. The name editor requires a reboot.

- This version of the game is still vulnerable to all the remote crashes from the Steam version, but the easy RCEs are not an issue (accidental by Treyarch). I recommend using network password and friends only.

lessons.lesson: Treat BO3Enhanced as the required partner-menu runtime lane when that menu is in use.
lessons.transformed_action: Keep Steam/T7/Reversa and BO3Enhanced manifests separated, but allow Reversa to train on and report the BO3Enhanced lane.

[BO3Enhanced](https://github.com/shiversoftdev/BO3Enhanced/releases/tag/Current) is a mod for the Windows Store edition of Black Ops 3 that allows you to crossplay with Steam and use the Steam game files.
2. Acquire the [Windows Store BO3 Executable and Dependencies](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rBZZTcSJ9_s)

3. Place the Windows Store BO3 Executable and Dependencies into the Steam game installation folder (Steam Library->Right Click Black Ops III->Properties->Installed Files->Browse) (Replace all if it asks)
4. Download the [Released Files](https://github.com/shiversoftdev/BO3Enhanced/releases/tag/Current) and place them into the Steam game installation folder (Replace all if it asks)

lessons.lesson: Cache platform/friends work and avoid refreshing it during gameplay hot paths.
lessons.transformed_action: Keep overlay, Steam, display, and process telemetry idle unless visible or explicitly capturing.

evidence.text: bool IsFriendByXUIDUncached(XUID xuid) // ok I say its "uncached" but thats because I don't want this running a billion times per second and I think it might hitch with huge friends lists.
if (GetTickCount64() < next_update_friendslist_time || !s_runningUILevel) // we will just not update the friends list in game because I really think this will hitch. STEAMAPI SUCKS

lessons.lesson: Move platform callbacks to a controlled background cadence rather than doing everything in-frame.
lessons.transformed_action: Keep Reversa telemetry publication non-blocking and avoid waiting on locks in Present paths.

evidence.text: CreateThread(NULL, NULL, steam_callbacks_thread, NULL, NULL, NULL);

lessons.lesson: Frame-event systems need hard budget discipline; every-frame hooks should schedule rare work out of band.
lessons.transformed_action: Use delayed/idle timers for overlay refresh and reserve frame-linked logic for lightweight counters only.

lessons.lesson: Config changes should be file-backed and watched outside the render path.
lessons.transformed_action: Prefer local config/marker files for Reversa test switches over Steam environment inheritance.

evidence.text: CreateThread(NULL, NULL, watch_settings_updates, NULL, NULL, NULL);

lessons.transformed_action: Keep Vulkan/RM11Pro profile switches separate from Windows-native D3D11/T7 behavior.

lessons.lesson: CPU affinity can change pacing, but it is hardware-sensitive and needs A/B captures before promotion.
lessons.transformed_action: Add affinity as an opt-in experiment only after overlay-idle and BO3Enhanced executable baselines.

lessons.lesson: Separate menu-required stability/runtime features from unrelated debugger, DRM, or stealth internals.
lessons.transformed_action: Train on the BO3Enhanced contract and port only compatibility-facing behavior that is needed, understood, and testable.

menu_contract.lesson: ConsoleIX currently attaches to Steam BlackOps3.exe and T7InternalWS directly.
menu_contract.transformed_action: Teach the menu bridge to resolve Steam BO3 and BO3Enhanced lanes independently before trusting offsets.

menu_contract.lesson: Bank writes must remain behind map, weapon, and resolved-address guards.
menu_contract.transformed_action: Keep bank/table pattern scanning ahead of signature fallback, and invalidate BankAddr on map or weapon changes.
